overview: Seven Corporation is a premium multi-service platform combining real estate and insurance advisory under one roof. Designed as an immersive asset advisory experience with dynamic service toggles, investment-focused property listings, trust signals, and high-conversion CTAs — targeting property buyers, investors, and insurance clients in Vadodara.
features: Dynamic split-screen hero with animated real estate and insurance visuals
Interactive Property ↔ Insurance service toggle with full UI morphing
Demo property listings with ROI indicators, rental yield tags, and investment badges
Buy/Lease/Invest toggle with smart filters on property cards
Fintech-style insurance section with policy comparison tabs
Trust & Authority section with count-up ratings and review carousel
Floating WhatsApp + sticky call CTA linked to real contact number
Scroll-triggered animations, cursor effects, and skeleton loading shimmer
Location & market insight map highlighting Gotri/Sevasi investment zones
SEO-optimized for Vadodara real estate and insurance keywords
